blocks.body: Verb to Be: Future — will be in simple future statements, negatives, and questions.

{ "title": "6. Short summary", "items": [ "The future form of to be = will be.", "With every subject, we use the same pattern: will be.", "Negatives: will not be / won't be.", "Questions: Will + subject + be...?", "In short answers, repeat will / won't: Yes, I will. / No, she won't.", "After will, always use be, not am / is / are." ] }
